channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: The Question About Elon Musk That SpaceX Refuses to Answer Before Its IPO
item.description: There’s a question floating around the biggest IPO in history, and SpaceX has chosen its words very carefully to avoid answering it. I’ve been reading pre-IPO paperwork for nearly two decades, and what’s missing from this one tells you more than what’s in it. The company is reportedly heading to ...

item.title: Move Over, Tesla. Another Robo-Taxi Stock Is Making Progress.
item.description: Tuesday, Pony AI reported first-quarter sales of $34.3 million, up from $14 million a year ago. Wall Street was looking for $22.3 million.

item.title: Tesla Stock Trades Higher as Investors Remain Focused on SpaceX
item.description: Tesla stock is going for a second consecutive weekly gain. Shares are in the green in premarket trading Tuesday.

item.title: Honestly, the SpaceX Prospectus Is Far Worse Than I Imagined
item.description: It's hard to believe SpaceX is angling for a $1.75 trillion valuation.

item.title: Tesla's Own Auditors Say The Growth Narrative Is Currently 'Not Probable'
SpaceX Just Filed for the Biggest IPO in History -- and One Number Has Wall Street Buzzing
item.description: Elon Musk's space technology company is floating one jaw-dropping figure as it prepares for an upcoming IPO.

item.title: Charging A Volvo EV At A Tesla Supercharger In Europe Will Get Way Easier
item.description: Volvo EV owners will be able to use over 20,000 Supercharger stations without ever opening the Tesla app.

item.title: Meet the Company Taking on SpaceX and Tesla -- It Could Be Worth More Than Both Combined by 2027
item.description: Robotaxis and satellite internet are side projects to this undervalued AI giant.

item.title: Jony Ive Designed Ferrari Luce Debuts With A $640,000 Price Tag And Interiors That Drift Apart From Tesla's Screen-Heavy Approach
item.description: Ferrari N.V. (NYSE:RACE) unveiled its first fully electric car Monday, presenting the four-door Luce, designed in collaboration with former Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) design chief Jony Ive and his collective LoveFrom, as a high-stakes bet that wealthy buyers will embrace a battery-powered Ferrari e...

item.title: NASA just gave SpaceX more crew missions because Boeing can’t certify
item.description: NASA has filed a procurement notice announcing its intent to add six post-certification missions to SpaceX’s existing Commercial Crew Transportation Capability contract. The agency said it would order up to three of those missions immediately upon adding them to the contract, with the remaining t...

item.title: Cybercab Testing in Las Vegas
item.description: Sorry for the glare, but saw this yesterday morning when picking up groceries here in Las Vegas. Super surprising to see! submitted by /u/dam_ships [link] [comments]

item.title: 'On Wall Street, We Are Front Stabbers. In Washington, They're Backstabbers,' Says Anthony Scaramucci. 'Look What They Did To Elon Musk'
item.description: Investor Anthony Scaramucci said Wall Street may be ruthless, but Washington politics is even worse, arguing that finance professionals attack people openly while political insiders work behind the scenes to take people down. “On Wall Street, we are front stabbers....

item.title: Cybercab testing in Miami
item.description: submitted by /u/pricey_melons [link] [comments]

item.title: The $2 Trillion Underwriting Case: Inside Chamath’s Blockbuster SpaceX Math
item.description: During a highly anticipated segment on the latest All-In Podcast, Chamath Palihapitiya laid out a detailed underwriting case to justify why SpaceX is worth a full two trillion dollars right now. He explained that a twenty-times sales multiple is actually a bargain when you properly measure it aga...

item.title: The SpaceX IPO Is Coming. These Are the 3 Most Important Numbers From Its S-1 Filing
item.description: SpaceX stock is expected to begin trading in a few weeks.

item.title: Investors Pile Into Tesla Call Options in Huge, Unusual Volume - a Bullish Signal?
item.description: Investors have piled Tesla call options expiring shortly at an at-the-money strike price. A Barchart report shows that volume for this contract is over 223 times normal. Some investors see TSLA stock as undervalued.

item.title: Musk abandoned his own ‘solar electric economy’ to burn gas for an AI chatbot no one uses
item.description: Elon Musk spent years telling the world that solar power was the obvious answer to Earth’s energy needs — that a small patch of desert could power the entire United States. Now, he’s burning millions of tons of fossil fuels to run an AI chatbot that has lost 60% of its downloads, selling the unus...

item.title: Didn’t know what this was but sounds like it’s a Cybercab. Interesting.
item.description: submitted by /u/BurtWonderstone [link] [comments]

item.title: SpaceX’s $2 Trillion Pitch: Is Elon Musk Quietly Building a Backup Internet for Civilization?
item.description: On a recent All-In Podcast episode dissecting SpaceX’s S-1 filing, guest investor Gavin Baker and the hosts framed Elon Musk’s privately held rocket and connectivity empire as something more ambitious than a high-growth tech company. David Friedberg argued that “having a space-based communication...

item.title: Why Tesla Robotaxi Dreams Can't Rescue Today's Weak Fundamentals
item.description: Tesla's Growth Story Is Cracking Under Margin and Demand Pressure

item.title: ‘He Knows the Flaws Because He Knows the Man’: Why Elon Musk’s OpenAI Attack Is Really About xAI
item.description: Rashaad Bilal of Earn Your Leisure distilled the Musk-versus-Altman saga down to one sharp line: “He knows the flaws because he knows the man.” That framing reorients how investors should read every legal filing, every X post, and every interview Elon Musk aims at OpenAI. The litigation is a comp...

item.title: Elon Musk’s Bugs Bunny Moment: Will SpaceX IPO Tank Tesla Stock?
item.description: The episode aired in 1948, but the idea is strangely valid today, except that it’s Elon Musk squaring off with himself. SpaceX is on the cusp of its initial public offering, which will raise a record amount of money. SpaceX plans to offer a relatively large amount of its stock to smaller retail i...

item.title: Did SpaceX’s $28.5 Trillion Bombshell Reveal Elon Musk’s Genius — or Peak Galaxy Brain?
item.description: The stock market has spent the past year rewarding companies tied to artificial intelligence, data centers, and energy infrastructure. Yet all of those themes may soon take a back seat to a single IPO. On June 12, SpaceX is expected to begin trading publicly in what many investors believe could b...

item.title: Ford Takes Aim At Tesla And BYD In Europe With New Electric Hatchback, SUV Roadmap
item.description: Ford Motor Co. CEO Jim Farley on Thursday outlined the automaker’s renewed push towards expanding in the European market with multiple new vehicles and powertrains. Seven New Vehicles, Including New Bronco, EVs In a post on X, Farley outlined that...

item.title: 'There's mania': Strategists weigh in on looming SpaceX IPO
item.description: It may be best for investors to wait until some of the excitement surrounding SpaceX fades before jumping in.

item.title: Tesla Model S Sparked Elon Musk's AI, Robotics And Space Revolution: 'Little Did We Know,' Says Cathie Wood
item.description: Investor Cathie Wood of ARK Invest has hailed the Tesla Inc. Model S following its sunset for kicking off a “revolution” led by Elon Musk in the artificial intelligence, outer space exploration and robotics sectors. Little Did We Know Wood,...

item.title: Did Tesla's SpaceX Stake And China FSD Rollout Just Reframe TSLA's AI And Autonomy Story?
item.description: In recent days, Tesla’s previously disclosed US$2.00 billion investment in SpaceX, now nearly 19 million SpaceX shares, has drawn fresh attention as SpaceX’s IPO plans, deep commercial ties with Tesla, and Tesla’s long-awaited rollout of Full Self‑Driving (Supervised) in China reshape how investo...

item.title: Ford Motor vs. Tesla: What Their Revenue Trends Tell Investors
item.description: Quarterly filings reveal how Ford and Tesla are managing revenue shifts amid evolving strategies and margin pressures. The latest numbers highlight key trends.

item.title: Tesla News On India Exit Recall And SpaceX Links Tests Valuation
item.description: Tesla has officially cancelled plans to build a manufacturing plant in India, ending years of talks with local authorities. The company is dealing with a recall of more than 14,000 Model Y vehicles in the U.S. tied to a safety label issue.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Says Iran Deal Near With Hormuz 'Opened'; Tesla, AI Stocks Near Buy Points
item.description: President Donald Trump said Saturday that the U.S. and Iran are close to an interim deal that will open the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Tesla now calls FSD ‘Tesla Assisted Driving’ in China – a more truthful name
item.description: Tesla has once again changed the name of its “FSD” system in China, using a more truthful name for the system in the world’s largest auto market. more…

item.title: Elon Musk Just Linked SpaceX, xAI, Tesla, and Nvidia Into 1 Trade. Here's How to Position Your Portfolio.
item.description: With all eyes on the looming SpaceX IPO, investors may be overlooking other ways to benefit from the broader ecosystem that Elon Musk has built.

item.title: Former Tesla Exec Betting Heat Pumps Are The Next Big Electrification Market
item.description: Heat pumps are emerging as the next major electrification battleground after electric vehicles, and former Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) executive Drew Baglino appears to be betting on the market early, according to TechCrunch. Baglino founded Sadi Thermal Machines in 2025, roughly a...

item.title: Cybercab launched
item.description: submitted by /u/PeakMuted2932 [link] [comments]

item.title: GM, Ford, Stellantis CEOs go back to the drawing board with EVs
item.description: Unless your name is Tesla, the U.S. EV market has been a minefield for original equipment manufacturers. There were dangerous cracks even as customers set a record sales pace through the first three quarters of 2025.

item.title: Cybercab found testing in San Francisco
item.description: Near Stanford University submitted by /u/JAAAAPAAAN [link] [comments]

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market Bets On Iran Deal; Tesla, These Five AI Plays Are At Buy Points
item.description: The stock market rebounded for solid weekly gains on Iran deal hopes, with talks continuing over the weekend. Tesla is near a buy point along with ASML and several other AI stocks.

item.title: Tesla Blindsided As Lithuanian Regulators Approved FSD Before Software Was Ready
item.description: submitted by /u/Saurta17 [link] [comments]

item.title: Elon Musk called it Epic: The full story of SpaceX’s Starship Flight 12
item.description: After two scrubbed attempts, SpaceX launched Starship V3 on Friday, May 22 from the brand new Pad 2 at Starbase, Texas, completing the most technically complex test flight the program has attempted and moving the bar in ways that matter for everything from commercial satellites to the first human...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Problems in Texas: What Could It Mean for TSLA Stock?
item.description: Tesla's autonomous driving ambitions still have trillion-dollar potential.

item.title: Elon Musk has given up on solar power (on Earth)
item.description: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?

item.title: Former Tesla president shares the secret to success he learned from his former boss, Elon Musk: ‘He demands to only work with world-class talent’
item.description: Elon Musk’s success at building out Tesla and SpaceX came down to the people he hired—and they often shared an unusual mix of four qualities, according to former Tesla president Jon McNeill.

item.title: Is Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) One of the Best ARK Stocks to Buy Right Now?
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is the Best ARK Stock. On May 16, Reuters reported that Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Cyber cab on I 75
item.description: Fort Myers, Florida is the last place I thought I’d see a Cybercab. submitted by /u/TheBeastlyCheese [link] [comments]

item.title: SpaceX Starship Test Features Pez Dispenser-Style Satellite Deployment Ahead of IPO
item.description: The importance of Starship can’t be overstated for SpaceX, which is planning to raise record amounts of money in a June IPO.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Rebounds To Highs; Tesla, These Five AI Plays Are At Buy Points
item.description: The stock market rebounded for solid weekly gains, with leaders showing bullish action. Tesla is near a buy point along with ASML and several other AI stocks. Here's what to do.

item.title: Elon Musk Says 'This Will Be Awesome' As NASA Unveils Moon Base Plans
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk, on Wednesday, backed NASA’s goal of establishing a base on the lunar surface as the agency prepares to return humans to the Moon with the Artemis mission. Elon Musk Reacts To NASA Moonbase...

item.title: Tesla Is Chasing the Future of Driving. Its Stock Is Stuck in a 350x Earnings Trap
item.description: Tesla’s new China hiring push for Full Self-Driving strengthens its autonomy narrative, even as valuation and execution risks remain elevated.

item.title: The SpaceX Paradox: How Can a Money-Losing Company Be Worth $2 Trillion?
item.description: Trillion dollar companies are typically profitable. SpaceX lost about $5 billion in 2025, according to its IPO registration statement.

item.title: Are mega-IPOs like SpaceX huge opportunities for options trades?
item.description: As part of the latest installment of Yahoo Finance's Options Playbook, BayCrest managing director David Boole explains the influence that mega-IPOs, the likes of SpaceX (SPAX.PVT), Anthropic (ANTH.PVT), and OpenAI (OPAI.PVT), are having on markets (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC), possible options trades, an...
